title: cacalia subulata
intro: Cacalia subulata, also known as the needle-leafed cacalia, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Compositae, native to the mountainous regions of China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestive health. Cacalia subulata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in the form of dried or fresh leaves in traditional Chinese medicine.
